title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DACUTON BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DUMARAO, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, TO MAYOR RAMON A. BENJAMIN, SR., MEMORIAL HLGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 10888 / 88 OG No. 28, 4503 (July 13, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7514, May 21, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DACUTON BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DUMARAO, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, TO MAYOR RAMON A. BENJAMIN, SR., MEMORIAL HLGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Dacuton Barangay High School in the Municipality of Dumarao, Province of Capiz, is hereby changed to Mayor Ramon A. Benjamin, Sr., Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 21, 1988 and February 6, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 21, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
